steps.title: Y-Axis Motor
steps.desc:
First, ensure the extrusion is clean of debris.

**BOM for this step:**
- 1x Aluminum Extrusion (2040)
- 1x MGN12H Linear Rail (300mm)
- 12x M3x8mm Button Head Screws
- 12x M3 T-Nuts
